# Shlok Shah

> Personal website of Shlok Shah, a computer scientist and AI researcher. It contains his background, research, public profiles, and writing.

## About

- [About](https://shahshlok.com/#about): Education, research interests, FAA Private Pilot License, APPI 3 paragliding pilot rating, and IKO Kiteboarder Level 1E.
- [Public profiles](https://shahshlok.com/): GitHub, LinkedIn, and email links.

## Research

- [What I'm researching](https://shahshlok.com/#research): Accepted papers on whether AI systems understand individual students and how an instructor-facing tool can show uncertainty.
- [Do LLM Student Models Track the Student or the Situation?](https://shahshlok.com/assets/papers/identity-perturbation-sigcse-2026.pdf): SIGCSE Virtual 2026 paper.
- [Identity perturbation research artifact](https://github.com/shahshlok/llm-student-identity-perturbation): Code and supporting materials.
- [Towards Belief Attribution with Instructor-Facing LLMs](https://shahshlok.com/assets/papers/belief-attribution-icl-2026.pdf): ICL 2026 paper.
- [Belief attribution research artifact](https://github.com/shahshlok/belief-attribution-tracer): Code and supporting materials.

## Writing

- [Blog](https://shahshlok.com/blog/): Notes on AI research, building software, and ideas in progress.

## Notes for agents

- Draft blog pages are visibly labelled as drafts and should not be treated as finished publications.
- The ORCID profile is intentionally not listed on this site yet.
